title: EIKS 600ml/22oz Glass Measuring Cup with 3 Different Scales (Oz, Cup, Ml) for Kitchen Cooking,Food Preparation,Serving Coffee Drinking
description:
About this item
【600ml Capacity】This glass measuring cup holds up to 600ml of liquid, making it ideal for various cooking and baking tasks.
【Three Measurement Scales】It features measurement scales in ounces (oz), milliliters (ml), and cups, making it versatile for different recipes.
【Easy Grip Handle and V-Shaped Spout】The ergonomic handle ensures a comfortable grip, while the V-shaped spout allows for smooth pouring without spills or drips.
【Borosilicate Glass】Crafted from durable borosilicate glass, with working temperatures ranging from -20℃ to 120℃. It’s safe for use in the oven, microwave, fridge, freezer, and dishwasher.
【Sleek and Modern Look】With its ultra-clear design, this measuring cup allows you to easily check the remaining contents. It’s perfect for serving milk, cream, espresso, tea, wine, cocktails, and desserts. Whether in a commercial kitchen or at home, it’s a versatile tool for measuring, mixing, and pouring.
reviews_1s: I put 1 cup of water in this measuring cup and it displayed as 3/4 cup.
